description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and subtle blue highlights along the receiver and handguard. The weapon is equipped with a detachable box magazine, a pistol grip, and a fixed stock with a slight curve for ergonomic shoulder placement. The upper receiver has a full-length Picatinny rail, suitable for mounting various optics or accessories, though no sighting system is currently attached. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a simple flash hider. The overall construction appears robust, primarily composed of metal with some polymer components for the grip and stock. The rifle's streamlined profile and modular features make it suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with blue accents, fixed stock, pistol grip, and detachable magazine. Features a standard barrel and full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's end, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's shape and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, grip, and the other side of the receiver and stock.
